title: smallanthus oaxacanus
intro: Smallanthus oaxacanus, also known as Oaxaca dandelion, is a perennial plant native to Mexico that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are rich in inulin, a prebiotic fiber that can help support gut health. The health benefits of Smallanthus oaxacanus include its potential to aid in digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and even help manage blood sugar levels in individuals with diabetes. Smallanthus oaxacanus can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or supplement, and its roots can also be used as a coffee substitute, highlighting its versatility in herbal preparations.
